nasb.text: I will smite them with pestilence and dispossess them, and I will make you into a nation greater and mightier than they.”

esv.text: I will strike them with the pestilence and disinherit them, and I will make of you a nation greater and mightier than they.”

cnv.text: 我要用瘟疫擊殺他們，除滅他們；我要使你成為大國，比他們還強。”

ccb.text: 我要用瘟疫毁灭他们，不让他们承受那片土地。但我要使你成为大国，比他们更强盛。”
